title: External MCP client
description: Let agents consume EXTERNAL MCP servers as tools. Owns mcpServers (custom auth headers AES-256-GCM at rest), CRUD + probe (enumerate + cache tools), and mcpClientTools() which turns each cached tool into an AI-SDK tool named mcp__<server>__<tool> whose execute() does a per-call connect→callTool→close via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk (HTTP/SSE). Merged into gatewayTools — agent surface ONLY, never re-exported on our own /mcp server (loop guard).
